problem: Is dopamine dysregulation cause or effect in schizophrenia — what is primary?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 19 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
